name: init_invariant_without_next
code:
proof fn phi_1_init_invariant_without_next<T>(spec: TempPred<T>, init: StatePred<T>, inv: StatePred<T>)
    requires
        forall |s: T| #[trigger] init(s) ==> inv(s),
        spec.entails(lift_state(init)),
    ensures
        spec.entails(always(lift_state(inv))),
{
}
reason: init_invariant requires both the init condition AND an inductive next-step — without the next-step obligation, an invariant holding at init should NOT be guaranteed to hold always

name: configmap_unmarshal_ignores_status
code:
proof fn phi_2_configmap_unmarshal_ignores_status(obj1: DynamicObjectView, obj2: DynamicObjectView)
    requires
        obj1.kind == Kind::ConfigMapKind,
        obj2.kind == Kind::ConfigMapKind,
        obj1.metadata == obj2.metadata,
        obj1.spec == obj2.spec,
        obj1.status != obj2.status,
        ConfigMapView::unmarshal_spec(obj1.spec) is Ok,
        ConfigMapView::unmarshal_status(obj1.status) is Ok,
        ConfigMapView::unmarshal_status(obj2.status) is Ok,
    ensures
        ConfigMapView::unmarshal(obj1)->Ok_0 == ConfigMapView::unmarshal(obj2)->Ok_0,
{
}
reason: _unmarshal_helper discards status entirely — but unmarshal_status is uninterpreted so the solver cannot know both calls produce the same Ok_0 value; if it can prove equality despite different status values, the status field is provably irrelevant

name: daemonset_transition_allows_template_change
code:
proof fn phi_3_daemonset_transition_allows_template_change(new_ds: DaemonSetView, old_ds: DaemonSetView)
    requires
        old_ds.spec is Some,
        new_ds.spec is Some,
        old_ds.spec->0.selector == new_ds.spec->0.selector,
        old_ds.spec->0.template != new_ds.spec->0.template,
    ensures
        new_ds._transition_validation(old_ds) == true,
{
}
reason: transition_validation only checks selector equality — if template changes are freely allowed by the spec, that may be too permissive (real Kubernetes restricts certain template mutations)

name: with_namespace_preserves_object_ref_name
code:
proof fn phi_4_with_namespace_preserves_object_ref_name(obj: DynamicObjectView, ns: StringView)
    requires
        obj.metadata.name is Some,
        obj.metadata.namespace is Some,
    ensures
        obj.with_namespace(ns).object_ref().name == obj.object_ref().name,
        obj.with_namespace(ns).object_ref().kind == obj.object_ref().kind,
        obj.with_namespace(ns).object_ref().namespace == ns,
        obj.with_namespace(ns).object_ref().namespace != obj.object_ref().namespace,
{
}
reason: the last ensures claims namespaces always differ — but if ns happens to equal the original namespace, this is false; the spec should not entail that with_namespace always changes the namespace

name: entails_trans_collapses_always
